issue_summary: I ordered a laptop but received a used and damaged unit. Customer support kept delaying replacement and then refused refund despite pickup of the item.
timeline: 05 Feb 2026: Order placed and paid online Rs. 78,999.
08 Feb 2026: Product delivered in damaged condition - screen cracked, missing charger.
09-20 Feb 2026: Multiple support tickets with no resolution. They kept saying 7 days.
22 Feb 2026: Item picked up, but refund not processed despite verbal promise.
evidence: Screenshots of chat support showing 4 unfulfilled promises
Email trail with support team dated 09-20 Feb
Pickup confirmation message with tracking number
Photos of damaged laptop (cracked screen, missing charger)
desired_resolution: Full refund of Rs. 78,999 with 18% interest from date of payment, plus Rs. 25,000 compensation for mental agony and harassment

follow_up_answers.q1: Laptop cost was Rs. 78,999 paid via HDFC debit card on 05 Feb 2026. I want full refund plus 18% interest = approx Rs. 82,000 total.
follow_up_answers.q2: Invoice shows: Example E-commerce Pvt Ltd, CIN U72200KA2018PTC123456, Registered Office: 4th Floor, Brigade Tower, MG Road, Bengaluru 560001. Grievance officer email: grievance@example.com
follow_up_answers.q3: Screen was cracked in 3 places, charger was missing, laptop had pre-existing user data/login showing it was a USED unit. I have 8 photos.
follow_up_answers.q5: I filed complaint on their portal (ticket #GRV-9988) on 10 Feb. Their policy says 7-day resolution. It has been 30+ days with no resolution.
follow_up_answers.q7: Ordered: HP Pavilion 15-eg3000, i5-1335U, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD. Received: Same model but clearly used/refurbished with physical damage.
